meaning: v.迷路,落伍,蔓生,四散,漫延n.散乱
examples: A straggle of crumbling buildings is all that remains of this hill-side village.
Yet sill we straggle to make a difference to change the world, to dream of hope.
This patient did not escape the need to straggle with suffering and courage, victory is to go in life, and straggle to find.
They admitted it didn't pay to keep it for just us straggle of kids who went there.
It only takes one of them to straggle back a little too casually for his opponents to easily spring the offside trap.
